sections.paragraph:
Ἰουθίνη, ης (an unusual nominal formation, also transmitted as Εὐθίνη; cp. Εὐθήνη prob. PLond 261, 178 col. 12 p. 58 [I a.d.]; s. deStrycker p. 313ff) Juthine name of Anna’s servant GJs 2:2f (v.l. Ἰουδίθ).

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

prob. prob. = probable, probably

PLond PLond = PLondon=Greek Papyri in the British Museum—List 4

col. col. = column

deStrycker deStrycker = ÉdeStrycker; s. GJs—List 1

GJs GJs = Gospel of James (Protevangelium Jacobi), II a.d.—List 1

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 479
